metadata.title: Document Management & Publishing
metadata.description: File-system based document management and publishing platform

auth.smtpNotConfigured: SMTP is not configured. The verification code is shown below (local dev only).

auth.systemAlreadyInitializedDesc: The system has already been initialized. Please sign in directly.
auth.createAdminAccount: Create an admin account to get started
auth.verificationSuccessDesc: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now sign in.
auth.enterCodeDesc: Please enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your email. The code is valid for 24 hours.

usersPage.title: User Management
usersPage.popconfirmRevokeDesc: This user will lose admin privileges.
usersPage.popconfirmGrantDesc: This user will gain full admin privileges.
usersPage.modalDisableContent: Account {email} will be disabled. The user will not be able to sign in.

modelsPage.title: Model Configuration
modelsPage.subtitle: Manage AI model API connection configurations
modelsPage.emptyText: No model configurations yet. Click the button above to add one.
modelsPage.confirmDeleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
modelsPage.confirmDeleteDefaultNote: Note: This is the default model. After deletion, new chats will not auto-select a model.
modelsPage.confirmImportContent: Detected {count} valid model configurations. Import them?
modelsPage.msgSetAsDefault: "{name}" has been set as the default model
modelsPage.msgRemovedDefault: "{name}" is no longer the default model
modelsPage.msgNoValidModels: No valid model configurations found in the file
modelsPage.msgFileParsingFailed: File parsing failed, please check the JSON format

modelConfigModal.ruleCustomProviderName: Please enter a custom provider name
modelConfigModal.msgEnterCustomProvider: Please enter a custom provider name
modelConfigModal.tooltipDisableAdaptive: Recommended for domestic models. When enabled, sets CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ADAPTIVE=1.
modelConfigModal.tooltipDefaultThinking: JSON string passed to the Claude Code SDK to enable extended thinking (default budgetTokens: 4096).
modelConfigModal.customEnvNote: Hardcoded system environment variables take higher priority

mcpPage.title: MCP Configuration
mcpPage.subtitle: Manage external MCP server connection configurations
mcpPage.tipFormatExample: Enter MCP server configuration JSON, format example:
mcpPage.tipSupportedTypes: Supported types: stdio, sse, streamable-http. See the MCP protocol documentation for details.
mcpPage.placeholderJson: Enter MCP server configuration JSON here…
mcpPage.msgInvalidJson: Invalid JSON format, please check your input
mcpPage.msgSaveFailedNetwork: Save failed, please check your network connection
mcpPage.msgNotValidObject: Current JSON is not a valid object, please fix it first
mcpPage.msgMcpConfigAdded: {brandName} MCP server configuration has been added. Click save to apply.

systemPromptsPage.title: System Prompts
systemPromptsPage.subtitle: Manage system-wide prompts. Enabled prompts will be automatically injected into all conversations.
systemPromptsPage.confirmDeleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete the system prompt "{name}"?

sandboxPage.title: Sandbox Configuration
sandboxPage.subtitle: Configure RabbitAI-Lab OpenSandbox service URL
sandboxPage.tipDescription: Configure the OpenSandbox service connection URL for running code in a sandbox environment.
sandboxPage.msgSaveFailedNetwork: Save failed, please check your network connection

storagePage.title: File Storage
storagePage.subtitle: Configure file storage data directory. All project documents will be stored under this directory.
storagePage.tipDescription: Configure the root directory for file storage. Leave empty to use the default path (data folder under the project directory). The path must be an absolute path starting with /.
storagePage.validationMustBeAbsolute: Storage path must be an absolute path starting with /
storagePage.validationNoDotSegments: Storage path cannot contain . or .. directory segments
storagePage.alertUsingDefault: Currently using the default storage path: data folder under the project directory
storagePage.msgSavedUpdated: Saved successfully, file storage path updated
storagePage.msgSavedRestored: Saved successfully, default storage path restored
storagePage.msgSaveFailedNetwork: Save failed, please check your network connection

emailPage.title: Email Service
emailPage.configNote: Changes take effect after clicking "Save". Without SMTP configured, verification emails will only be printed to the server console and users will not receive emails.
emailPage.alertNotConfiguredDesc: Without SMTP configured, verification emails will only be printed to the server console and users will not receive emails.
emailPage.tipSsl: Port 465 is usually enabled; ports 587/25 are usually disabled (use STARTTLS)
emailPage.placeholderPasswordSet: Leave empty to keep the current password
emailPage.placeholderPasswordEmpty: SMTP login password or authorization code
emailPage.tipPasswordSet: Password is set (hidden). Only fill in when you need to change it.
emailPage.tipSenderEmail: Leave empty to use noreply@‹SMTP Host›
emailPage.testEmailDesc: Send a test email to verify the SMTP configuration.
emailPage.testEmailWarning: Testing uses saved settings. Please click "Save" first.
emailPage.testEmailUnsaved: You have unsaved changes. The test will use saved values.
emailPage.msgPleaseEnterEmail: Please enter a recipient email address
emailPage.templateTip: Customize the verification email content. Leave empty to use the default template.
emailPage.placeholderHtmlBody: Leave empty to use the default template
emailPage.alertAvailableVarsTitle: Available variables: brandName / code / verifyUrl / codeBlock
emailPage.alertAvailableVarsDesc: codeBlock renders a styled verification code display block. Leave empty to use the default template.

databasePage.title: Database
databasePage.subtitle: Export, restore, and inspect the database
databasePage.exportDesc: Export the entire database. JSON format is database-agnostic and can be restored via the import function below. SQL format generates SQLite-compatible INSERT statements.
databasePage.restoreDesc: Import a previously exported JSON backup file. This will replace all existing data in the database.
databasePage.msgInvalidDumpFile: Invalid backup file: missing version or table information
databasePage.confirmRestoreReplaceData: This will replace all existing data in the database.
databasePage.confirmRestoreWarning: This action is irreversible. Please ensure you have a backup.

inviteCodesPage.title: Invite Code Management
inviteCodesPage.textUsedCodesCannotDelete: Used invite codes cannot be deleted

plansPage.title: Plans
plansPage.subtitle: Manage subscription plans and pricing
plansPage.confirmDeleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete the plan "{title}"?

generalPage.title: Site Settings
generalPage.subtitle: Configure site-wide branding and general settings
generalPage.brandNameDesc: The brand name is displayed in the sidebar, page titles, emails, and other system displays.
generalPage.siteUrlDesc: The base URL used in email verification links and other system-generated URLs.
generalPage.msgSaveFailedNetwork: Save failed, please check network connection

authSettingsPage.title: System Settings
authSettingsPage.siteUrlDesc: The public URL of your site (e.g., https://example.com). Used for email verification links, OAuth callbacks, etc. Leave empty to use the NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL environment variable or fall back to http://localhost:3000.
authSettingsPage.openRegDesc: When disabled, the registration endpoint will reject new users (only admin invites or initial setup can create accounts)
authSettingsPage.inviteCodeDesc: When enabled, a valid invite code is required for registration (depends on open registration)
authSettingsPage.emailVerifyDesc: When enabled, users with unverified emails cannot log in
authSettingsPage.passkeyDesc: When enabled, users can log in with biometrics or device PIN via WebAuthn on the login page and profile settings
authSettingsPage.rpIdDesc: The domain name bound to Passkey (e.g., chat.example.com). Leave empty to auto-detect from the request Host header. Must match the browser's domain, otherwise the browser will reject registration.
authSettingsPage.rpNameDesc: A friendly name displayed to users in the browser prompt. Defaults to RabbitDocs when left empty
authSettingsPage.configNote: Changes take effect after clicking Save. The system super admin (first registered account) can always log in regardless of these settings. Configure email service in the Email menu.

shareHtml.title: Share as HTML
shareHtml.description: Generate the current document as a standalone HTML file accessible via link.
shareHtml.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel sharing? The link will be invalidated immediately.
shareHtml.shareNotice: Anyone with this link can view this HTML. Sharing always reflects the latest content of the file, and the link becomes invalid after deletion.
shareHtml.generateDesc: Generate a public link so anyone can view this HTML in a read-only sandbox iframe.
shareHtml.sandboxNotice: For security, the iframe uses sandbox="", blocking scripts, forms, and popups.
